scope: environment / travel / rest research (data + DAG + coverage + OOS coefficients only; does NOT modify production probability)

in_repo.note: results only (date/home/away/scores/stage/venue); NO env exposure variables

external_readonly.usage: READ-ONLY input; World Cup kept held-out; NOT committed to this branch
READ-ONLY; E must NOT modify D files

oos.method: Elo(as-of, NON-WC only) + Poisson + Ridge(IRLS w/ step-halving); symmetric (A-B) env features; benchmarks vs RESEARCH Elo+Poisson proxy (NOT production A v4); WC held-out + walk-forward + EDITION-LEVEL cluster-bootstrap delta (with-replacement resample by WC year, seed=20260711, reproducible)
v2_statistical_fixes: cluster bootstrap now resamples World Cup EDITIONS with replacement (seed fixed) — v1 used Math.random() per team, not reproducible
coefficient bootstrap uses the same seeded RNG
VIF auxiliary regressions now include an intercept -> VIF>=1 by construction (v1 VIF<1 was a without-intercept bug)
cross physical travel proxy separated from cross_unknown missingness flag via cross-only sensitivity run
baseline explicitly flagged as research Elo+Poisson proxy, not production A v4

cross_confederation.note: plausible ~-5% goal intensity; OOS gain not stable; stable even without cross_unknown flag

cross_unknown.note: confederation-resolution ARTIFACT (missingness proxy), NOT physical env exposure

not_estimated.neutral: 100% present, no effective variation -> omitted from fit

verdict.conclusion: NO stable OOS gain over research Elo+Poisson baseline; env coefficients remain shadow (usedInModel:false). Sign stability != production readiness. Directionally consistent with v1; now statistically implemented correctly. NOT the paper's final CI until implementation finalized.

artifacts.note: all derivable from scripts + READ-ONLY 49k pool (ENV_RESEARCH_POOL_DIR); reproducible; no fabrication

missing_mechanism: structural (historical editions have no env fields); missing != neutral; mark missing_reason; degrade to base model pre-1960s; non-random missingness only as feature after OOS proof
file_boundary: only docs/research/environment-*, data/research/environment-*, scripts/research-environment-* (incl. research-environment-pool-lib.js / -pool-adapter.js / -oos.js / test-research-environment-pool-lib.js / test-research-environment-oos-lib.js); never lib/prediction.js or public API; never commit the 49k pool
